headline: Micron Deepens AI Memory Push With New India Facility And DRAM Launch
summary: Micron Technology introduced a 256GB SOCAMM2 low power DRAM module for AI data centers, described as the industry's highest capacity in its class. The company has started sampling this module to customers, targeting AI workloads that require high memory capacity and efficiency. Micron also opened a new semiconductor assembly and test facility in India, expanding its global manufacturing footprint. For investors watching NasdaqGS:MU, these announcements come at a time when the stock trades...

headline: Coinbase, Other Crypto Stocks Surge. What’s Behind the Rally.
summary: Strategy Coinbase  and  Robinhood  stocks are, in fact, among the best performers.  Strategy, the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, was jumping more than 7.8%—crypto exchange Coinbase rose 9.6% and trading platform Robinhood was 5.6% higher.  The price of Bitcoin surged to $71,269 early in the day, up close to 7% over the past 24 hours, according to CoinDesk data.
